name: Burr
role: A human child half-adopted by the Glade, at the center of a warden dispute
voiceHints: Feral-gentle, more at ease with beasts than people, uses grove-words for things. Doesn't know they're the subject of an argument. Wondering, watchful, quick to bond with anyone who treats the Glade as kin.
knowledge: The grove's moods and safe places better than any warden
Small truths about the Old Stag the wardens haven't noticed
That something is wrong lately — the grove is sad — without knowing why
wants: To belong somewhere without being made to choose between the Glade and being human.
fears: Being sent away to 'people'; or being kept, and the Glade dying around them.

reactsToReputation.warm: attaches fast, guides them through the Glade

appearance: A wiry human child of about nine, sun-dark, hair bleached to straw at the ends and cut with a knife. Green stains on the knees and elbows that no longer wash out. Always slightly out of breath.
